subject: offline local-model transition predictor

evidence: examples/gateway/local-first.yaml contains only a deployment-selected llama-cpp embedding placeholder
no Blackcell llama-cpp adapter implementation is present
no configured offline route consumes the WP10 transition-prediction contract
no offline predictor has been run against the WP10 typed targets
no offline predictor has exact-match or Brier results against the same canonical outcome snapshots and budgets

reason: Adding an unconfigured adapter would create an unmeasured provider edge and imply capability that the repository cannot currently exercise.
promotion_prerequisites: install or deploy an offline runtime with a pinned model and explicit availability probe
configure a gateway-owned local prediction route with input, output, time, token, and memory bounds
map its output into the existing advisory transition-prediction schema without observation or transition authority
run a matched WP24 comparison against the deterministic WP10 baseline over identical targets, source states, actions, horizons, and outcome snapshots
record exact-match, missing/conflict coverage, Brier calibration, latency, token usage, and resource cost
promote only if the measured benefit justifies the new runtime and model dependency
